title: Microservices Architecture
description: Designed and deployed a scalable microservices system with Spring Boot, Docker, and service discovery for high-availability workloads.
longDescription: A production-grade microservices platform handling distributed transactions, inter-service communication via REST and message queues, and centralized logging. Built with domain-driven design principles and deployed on containerized infrastructure.
highlights: Decomposed monolith into multiple independent services
Implemented circuit breaker and retry patterns
Externalized configuration and CI/CD pipelines for automated deployments

title: Portfolio Website
description: Built a modern single-page portfolio with Next.js, Tailwind CSS, Framer Motion animations, and a dark/light mode toggle.
longDescription: A fully responsive developer portfolio featuring scroll animations, project modals, a searchable knowledge base, and an async contact form. Optimized for performance with static generation and semantic HTML.
highlights: Dark/light mode with system preference detection
Scroll-spy navigation and Framer Motion animations
Modular component architecture for easy content updates

title: Java Interview Prep Hub
description: Created a knowledge hub with curated Java interview guide covering Core Java, DSA, System Design - HLD & LLD, Spring Boot, microservices, Rest API, Database, CI/CD, AI.
longDescription: A structured collection of interview preparation guide/path organized by topic — from Core Java to System Design and Microservices Architecture. Integrated directly into this portfolio as a searchable resources section.
highlights: Covers Java, DSA, System Design - HLD & LLD, Spring Boot, Rest API, Microservices, Database, CI/CD, AI
Continuously updated from real interview experience
